Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include re-submission cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER compared to elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average waiting time to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that eventually lead to Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants where the same declaration is resubmitted more than once
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE occurs

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time between Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER and the subsequent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER versus time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER including only cases that originate from domestic declarations
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER and the end of the case

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in 2018 data versus 2017 data
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'", 'end': "activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'year'}"
